zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chiselden於大約1375年出生時，她的父親William Cheselden26歲，母親Elizabeth de Warre-8歲。她於1401年與William Wadham在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年3月20日享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chiselden was born about 1375, her father, William Cheselden, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth de Warre, was -8. She married William Wadham in 1401, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 March 1474, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chiselden est née environ 1375, son père, William Cheselden, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Warre, avait -8 ans. Elle a épousé William Wadham en 1401, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1474, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chiselden um 1375 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cheselden 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Warre -8. Sie hat 1401 in Devon, England, United Kingdom William Wadham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1474 im Alter von 100 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chiselden è nata il circa 1375, sua padre, William Cheselden, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Warre, aveva -8 anni. Lei sposato William Wadham nel 1401, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1474, all'età di 100 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chiselden(이)가 대략 1375년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cheselden(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Warre(은)는 -8세였다. 그녀는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 3월 20일 100세의 나이로 사망했다.
